revision.text: '''久麻久神社'''(くまくじんじゃ)は愛知県西尾市にある神社。社地は八ツ面町麓と熊味町にある。八ツ面町にある本殿は、一重入母屋造、三間向拝付の1527年(大永7年)に造立されたもので、国指定重要文化財である。延喜式内社。祭神は、大雀命、須佐之男命、熱田大神。祟神天皇の時代に創建されたとされる。 == 参考資料 == *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html 久麻久神社｜西尾市公式ウェブサイト] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ 久麻久神社 – 西尾観光 – 西尾観光協会] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 久麻久神社本殿 くまくじんじゃほんでん - 文化遺産データベース] {{Coord|34.87467836340709|137.07669606348378}} [[Category:三河国の式内社]]

{{神社 | 名称 = 久麻久神社 | 画像 = | 所在地 = 愛知県西尾市八ツ面町麗77番地 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 52| 緯度秒 = 34 | 経度度 = 137| 経度分 = 4| 経度秒 = 26 | 祭神 = 大雀命、須佐之男命、熱田大神 | 神体 = | 社格 = 延喜式内社 | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = Japan Aichi }}
'''久麻久神社'''（くまくじんじゃ）は、愛知県西尾市にある神社。
社地は八ツ面町麓と熊味町にある。八ツ面町にある本殿は、一重入母屋造、三間向拝付の1527年（大永7年）に造立されたもので、国指定重要文化財である。延喜式内社。祭神は、大雀命、須佐之男命、熱田大神。祟神天皇の時代に創建されたとされる。
== 外部リンク == *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html 久麻久神社｜西尾市公式ウェブサイト] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ 久麻久神社 – 西尾観光 – 西尾観光協会] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 久麻久神社本殿 くまくじんじゃほんでん - 文化遺産データベース]
{{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:くまくしんしや}} [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]]

旧郷社 | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = Japan Aichi }} '''久麻久神社'''（くまくじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]にある[[神社]]。旧社格は[[郷社]]。 社地は[[八ツ面町]]麓と[[熊味町]]にある。八ツ面町にある本殿は、一重入母屋造、三間向拝付の[[1527年]]（[[大永]]7年）に造立されたもので、[[重要文化財|国指定重要文化財]]である。[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]。祭神は、[[仁徳天皇|大雀命]]、[[スサノオ|須佐之男命]]、[[熱田神宮|熱田大神]]。祟神天皇の時代に創建されたとされる。 == 出典 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html 久麻久神社｜西尾市公式ウェブサイト] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ 久麻久神社 – 西尾観光 – 西尾観光協会] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 久麻久神社本殿 くまくじんじゃほんでん - 文化遺産データベース] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:くまくしんしや}} [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]]

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{Expand Japanese|久麻久神社}}

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Kumaku Shrine'''|久麻久神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

revision.comment: 5 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 | 名称 = 久麻久神社 | 画像 = [[File:Kumakujinja.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | 所在地 = [[愛知県]][[西尾市]][[八ツ面町]]麗77番地 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 52| 緯度秒 = 34 | 経度度 = 137| 経度分 = 4| 経度秒 = 26 | 祭神 = [[大雀命]]、[[須佐之男命]]、[[熱田大神]]{{Cite Kotobank|word=久麻久神社|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | 神体 = | 社格 = [[延喜式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = Japan Aichi }} '''久麻久神社'''（くまくじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]にある[[神社]]。旧社格は[[郷社]]。 == 概要 == 社地は[[八ツ面町]]麓と[[熊味町]]にある。八ツ面町にある本殿は、一重入母屋造、三間向拝付の[[1527年]]（[[大永]]7年）に造立されたもので、[[重要文化財|国指定重要文化財]]である。[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]。祭神は、[[仁徳天皇|大雀命]]、[[スサノオ|須佐之男命]]、[[熱田神宮|熱田大神]]。祟神天皇の時代に創建されたとされる。 == 出典 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html 久麻久神社｜西尾市公式ウェブサイト] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ 久麻久神社 – 西尾観光 – 西尾観光協会] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 久麻久神社本殿 くまくじんじゃほんでん - 文化遺産データベース] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:くまくしんしや}} [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[久麻久神社]] to [[Kumaku Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Merging Japanese Wikipedia import with English content

== {{神社 | 名称 = 久麻久神社 | 画像 = [[File:Kumakujinja.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | 所在地 = [[愛知県]][[西尾市]][[八ツ面町]]麗77番地 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 52| 緯度秒 = 34 | 経度度 = 137| 経度分 = 4| 経度秒 = 26 | 祭神 = [[大雀命]]、[[須佐之男命]]、[[熱田大神]]{{Cite Kotobank|word=久麻久神社|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | 神体 = | 社格 = [[延喜式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = Japan Aichi }} '''久麻久神社'''（くまくじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]にある[[神社]]。旧社格は[[郷社]]。 == 概要 == 社地は[[八ツ面町]]麓と[[熊味町]]にある。八ツ面町にある本殿は、一重入母屋造、三間向拝付の[[1527年]]（[[大永]]7年）に造立されたもので、[[重要文化財|国指定重要文化財]]である。[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]。祭神は、[[仁徳天皇|大雀命]]、[[スサノオ|須佐之男命]]、[[熱田神宮|熱田大神]]。祟神天皇の時代に創建されたとされる。 == 出典 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html 久麻久神社｜西尾市公式ウェブサイト] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ 久麻久神社 – 西尾観光 – 西尾観光協会] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 久麻久神社本殿 くまくじんじゃほんでん - 文化遺産データベース] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:くまくしんしや}} [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] ==End Japanese==

== {{神社 | 名称 = 久麻久神社 | 画像 = [[File:Kumakujinja.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | 所在地 = [[愛知県]][[西尾市]][[八ツ面町]]麗77番地 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 52| 緯度秒 = 34 | 経度度 = 137| 経度分 = 4| 経度秒 = 26 | 祭神 = [[大雀命]]、[[須佐之男命]]、[[熱田大神]]{{Cite Kotobank|word=久麻久神社|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | 神体 = | 社格 = [[延喜式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = Japan Aichi }} '''久麻久神社'''（くまくじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]にある[[神社]]。旧社格は[[郷社]]。 == 概要 == 社地は[[八ツ面町]]麓と[[熊味町]]にある。八ツ面町にある本殿は、一重入母屋造、三間向拝付の[[1527年]]（[[大永]]7年）に造立されたもので、[[重要文化財|国指定重要文化財]]である。[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]。祭神は、[[仁徳天皇|大雀命]]、[[スサノオ|須佐之男命]]、[[熱田神宮|熱田大神]]。祟神天皇の時代に創建されたとされる。 == 出典 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html 久麻久神社｜西尾市公式ウェブサイト] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ 久麻久神社 – 西尾観光 – 西尾観光協会] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 久麻久神社本殿 くまくじんじゃほんでん - 文化遺産データベース] {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]]

[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|久麻久神社|version=106739772|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 | 名称 = 久麻久神社 | 画像 = [[File:Kumakujinja.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|西尾市|Q317844}}{{jalink|八ツ面町|Q87701383}}麗77番地 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 52| 緯度秒 = 34 | 経度度 = 137| 経度分 = 4| 経度秒 = 26 | 祭神 = {{jalink|大雀命}}、{{jalink|須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|熱田大神}}{{Cite Kotobank|word=久麻久神社|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | 神体 = | 社格 = {{jalink|延喜式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社}} | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = Japan Aichi }} '''久麻久神社'''（くまくじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|西尾市|Q317844}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社}}。 == 概要 == 社地は{{jalink|八ツ面町|Q87701383}}麓と{{jalink|熊味町|Q80930815}}にある。八ツ面町にある本殿は、一重入母屋造、三間向拝付の{{jalink|1527年|Q6412}}（{{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}7年）に造立されたもので、{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622|国指定重要文化財}}である。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|延喜式内社}}。祭神は、{{jalink|仁徳天皇|Q313119|大雀命}}、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|熱田神宮|Q482065|熱田大神}}。祟神天皇の時代に創建されたとされる。 == 出典 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html 久麻久神社｜西尾市公式ウェブサイト] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ 久麻久神社 – 西尾観光 – 西尾観光協会] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 久麻久神社本殿 くまくじんじゃほんでん - 文化遺産データベース] {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]]

'愛知県西尾市八ツ面町麗77番地', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '愛知県西尾市八ツ面町麓', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:久麻久神社]] {{wikidata link|Q131932258}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称 = 久麻久神社 | 画像 = [[File:Kumakujinja.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|西尾市|Q317844}}{{jalink|八ツ面町|Q87701383}}麗77番地 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 52| 緯度秒 = 34 | 経度度 = 137| 経度分 = 4| 経度秒 = 26 | 祭神 = {{jalink|大雀命}}、{{jalink|須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|熱田大神}}{{Cite Kotobank|word=久麻久神社|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | 神体 = | 社格 = {{jalink|延喜式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = Japan Aichi }} '''久麻久神社'''（くまくじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|西尾市|Q317844}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 === 概要 === 社地は{{jalink|八ツ面町|Q87701383}}麓と{{jalink|熊味町|Q80930815}}にある。八ツ面町にある本殿は、一重入母屋造、三間向拝付の{{jalink|1527年|Q6412}}（{{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}7年）に造立されたもので、{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622|国指定重要文化財}}である。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|延喜式内社}}。祭神は、{{jalink|仁徳天皇|Q313119|大雀命}}、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|熱田神宮|Q482065|熱田大神}}。祟神天皇の時代に創建されたとされる。 === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html 久麻久神社｜西尾市公式ウェブサイト] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ 久麻久神社 – 西尾観光 – 西尾観光協会] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 久麻久神社本殿 くまくじんじゃほんでん - 文化遺産データベース] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:くまくしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|西尾市|Q317844}}{{jalink|八ツ面町|Q87701383}}麗77番地 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 52| 緯度秒 = 34 | 経度度 = 137| 経度分 = 4| 経度秒 = 26 | 祭神 = {{jalink|大雀命}}、{{jalink|須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|熱田大神}}{{Cite Kotobank|word=久麻久神社|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | 神体 = | 社格 = {{jalink|延喜式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = Japan Aichi }} '''久麻久神社'''（くまくじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|西尾市|Q317844}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 === 概要 === 社地は{{jalink|八ツ面町|Q87701383}}麓と{{jalink|熊味町|Q80930815}}にある。八ツ面町にある本殿は、一重入母屋造、三間向拝付の{{jalink|1527年|Q6412}}（{{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}7年）に造立されたもので、{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622|国指定重要文化財}}である。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|延喜式内社}}。祭神は、{{jalink|仁徳天皇|Q313119|大雀命}}、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|熱田神宮|Q482065|熱田大神}}。祟神天皇の時代に創建されたとされる。 === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html 久麻久神社｜西尾市公式ウェブサイト] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ 久麻久神社 – 西尾観光 – 西尾観光協会] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 久麻久神社本殿 くまくじんじゃほんでん - 文化遺産データベース] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:くまくしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | ??? = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Nishio|Q317844}}{{jalink|Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383}} Urai 77 | ??? = 34| ??? = 52| ??? = 34 | ??? = 137| ??? = 4| ??? = 26 | ?? = {{jalink|?sazaki-no-Mikoto}}?{{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}?{{jalink|Atsuta-no-?kami}}{{Cite Kotobank|word=?????|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | ?? = | ?? = {{jalink|Engishiki naisha}}?former {{jalink|G?-sha|Q134917316}} | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = | ??? = | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = Japan Aichi }} '''Kumaku Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Nishio|Q317844}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former shrine rank was {{jalink|G?-sha|Q134917316}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{jalink|Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383}} Urai and {{jalink|Kumami-ch?|Q80930815}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{jalink|1527|Q6412}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{jalink|Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|national Important Cultural Property}}. It is an {{jalink|Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|Engishiki-listed shrine}}. The enshrined deities are {{jalink|Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|?sazaki-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|Atsuta-no-?kami}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} {{DEFAULTSORT:???????}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | ??? = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Nishio|Q317844}}{{jalink|Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383}} Urai 77 | ??? = 34| ??? = 52| ??? = 34 | ??? = 137| ??? = 4| ??? = 26 | ?? = {{jalink|?sazaki-no-Mikoto}}?{{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}?{{jalink|Atsuta-no-?kami}}{{Cite Kotobank|word=?????|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | ?? = | ?? = {{jalink|Engishiki naisha}}?former {{jalink|G?-sha|Q134917316}} | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = | ??? = | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = Japan Aichi }} '''Kumaku Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Nishio|Q317844}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former shrine rank was {{jalink|G?-sha|Q134917316}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{jalink|Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383}} Urai and {{jalink|Kumami-ch?|Q80930815}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{jalink|1527|Q6412}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{jalink|Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|national Important Cultural Property}}. It is an {{jalink|Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|Engishiki-listed shrine}}. The enshrined deities are {{jalink|Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|?sazaki-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|Atsuta-no-?kami}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} {{DEFAULTSORT:???????}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | ??? = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Nishio|Q317844}}{{jalink|Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383}} Urai 77 | ??? = 34| ??? = 52| ??? = 34 | ??? = 137| ??? = 4| ??? = 26 | ?? = {{jalink|?sazaki-no-Mikoto}}?{{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}?{{jalink|Atsuta-no-?kami}}{{Cite Kotobank|word=?????|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | ?? = | ?? = {{jalink|Engishiki naisha}}?former {{jalink|G?-sha|Q134917316}} | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = | ??? = | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = Japan Aichi }} '''Kumaku Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Nishio|Q317844}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former shrine rank was {{jalink|G?-sha|Q134917316}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{jalink|Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383}} Urai and {{jalink|Kumami-ch?|Q80930815}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{jalink|1527|Q6412}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{jalink|Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|national Important Cultural Property}}. It is an {{jalink|Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|Engishiki-listed shrine}}. The enshrined deities are {{jalink|Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|?sazaki-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|Atsuta-no-?kami}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} {{DEFAULTSORT:???????}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]]

The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{jalink|1527|Q6412}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{jalink|Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|national Important Cultural Property}}. It is an {{jalink|Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|Engishiki-listed shrine}}. The enshrined deities are {{jalink|Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|?sazaki-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|Atsuta-no-?kami}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} {{DEFAULTSORT:???????}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Its former shrine rank was {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|WD=Q87701383}} Urai and {{ill|lt=Kumami-ch?|Q80930815|WD=Q80930815}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{ill|lt=1527|Q6412|WD=Q6412}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|lt=national Important Cultural Property}}. It is an {{ill|lt=Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki-listed shrine}}. The enshrined deities are {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|WD=Q313119|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|WD=Q482065|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} {{DEFAULTSORT:???????}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqq]] [[Category:Nnn]]

Its former shrine rank was {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|WD=Q87701383}} Urai and {{ill|lt=Kumami-ch?|Q80930815|WD=Q80930815}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{ill|lt=1527|Q6412|WD=Q6412}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|lt=national Important Cultural Property}}. It is an {{ill|lt=Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki-listed shrine}}. The enshrined deities are {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|WD=Q313119|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|WD=Q482065|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} {{DEFAULTSORT:???????}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqq]] [[Category:Nnn]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | ??? = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nishio|Q317844|WD=Q317844|1=Nishio}}{{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|WD=Q87701383|1=Yatsuomote-chō}} Urai 77 | ??? = 34| ??? = 52| ??? = 34 | ??? = 137| ??? = 4| ??? = 26 | ?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}?{{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}?{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami|1=UNKNOWN}}{{Cite Kotobank|word=?????|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | ?? = | ?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki naisha|1=UNKNOWN}}?former {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = | ??? = | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = Japan Aichi }} '''Kumaku Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Nishio|Q317844|WD=Q317844|1=Nishio}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former shrine rank was {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|WD=Q87701383|1=Yatsuomote-chō}} Urai and {{ill|lt=Kumami-ch?|Q80930815|WD=Q80930815|1=Kumami-chō}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{ill|lt=1527|Q6412|WD=Q6412|1=1527}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|lt=national Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}. It is an {{ill|lt=Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki-listed shrine|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. The enshrined deities are {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|WD=Q313119|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|WD=Q482065|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami|1=Atsuta Shrine}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} {{DEFAULTSORT:???????}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqq]] [[Category:Nnn]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]]

Its former shrine rank was {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|WD=Q87701383|1=Yatsuomote-chō}} Urai and {{ill|lt=Kumami-ch?|Q80930815|WD=Q80930815|1=Kumami-chō}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{ill|lt=1527|Q6412|WD=Q6412|1=1527}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|lt=national Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}. It is an {{ill|lt=Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki-listed shrine|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. The enshrined deities are {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|WD=Q313119|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|WD=Q482065|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami|1=Atsuta Shrine}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} {{DEFAULTSORT:???????}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:Nnn]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nishio]]

Its former shrine rank was {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|WD=Q87701383|1=Yatsuomote-chō}} Urai and {{ill|lt=Kumami-ch?|Q80930815|WD=Q80930815|1=Kumami-chō}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{ill|lt=1527|Q6412|WD=Q6412|1=1527}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|lt=national Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}. It is an {{ill|lt=Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki-listed shrine|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. The enshrined deities are {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|WD=Q313119|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|WD=Q482065|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami|1=Atsuta Shrine}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三河国の式内社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nishio]]

Its former shrine rank was {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|WD=Q87701383|1=Yatsuomote-chō}} Urai and {{ill|lt=Kumami-ch?|Q80930815|WD=Q80930815|1=Kumami-chō}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{ill|lt=1527|Q6412|WD=Q6412|1=1527}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|lt=national Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}. It is an {{ill|lt=Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki-listed shrine|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. The enshrined deities are {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|WD=Q313119|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|WD=Q482065|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami|1=Atsuta Shrine}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:愛知県の重要文化財]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nishio]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | ??? = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nishio|Q317844|WD=Q317844|1=Nishio}}{{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|WD=Q87701383|1=Yatsuomote-chō}} Urai 77 | ??? = 34| ??? = 52| ??? = 34 | ??? = 137| ??? = 4| ??? = 26 | ?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}?{{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}?{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami|1=UNKNOWN}}{{Cite Kotobank|word=?????|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | ?? = | ?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki naisha|1=UNKNOWN}}?former {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = | ??? = | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = Japan Aichi }} '''Kumaku Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Nishio|Q317844|WD=Q317844|1=Nishio}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former shrine rank was {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|WD=Q87701383|1=Yatsuomote-chō}} Urai and {{ill|lt=Kumami-ch?|Q80930815|WD=Q80930815|1=Kumami-chō}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{ill|lt=1527|Q6412|WD=Q6412|1=1527}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|lt=national Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}. It is an {{ill|lt=Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki-listed shrine|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. The enshrined deities are {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|WD=Q313119|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|WD=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|WD=Q482065|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami|1=Atsuta Shrine}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:西尾市の建築物]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nishio]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=230}} | ??? = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nishio|Q317844|qid=Q317844|1=Nishio}}{{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|qid=Q87701383|1=Yatsuomote-chō}} Urai 77 | ??? = 34| ??? = 52| ??? = 34 | ??? = 137| ??? = 4| ??? = 26 | ?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}?{{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}?{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami|1=UNKNOWN}}{{Cite Kotobank|word=?????|encyclopedia=|accessdate=2024-05-30}} | ?? = | ?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki naisha|1=UNKNOWN}}?former {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = | ??? = | ?? = | ?? = | ?? = Japan Aichi }} '''Kumaku Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Nishio|Q317844|qid=Q317844|1=Nishio}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former shrine rank was {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Overview === Its precincts are in {{ill|lt=Yatsumote-ch?|Q87701383|qid=Q87701383|1=Yatsuomote-chō}} Urai and {{ill|lt=Kumami-ch?|Q80930815|qid=Q80930815|1=Kumami-chō}}. The main hall in Yatsumote-ch? is a one-bay irimoya-zukuri structure with a three-bay front porch, built in {{ill|lt=1527|Q6412|qid=Q6412|1=1527}} (Daiei 7), and is a {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|qid=Q1188622|lt=national Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}. It is an {{ill|lt=Engishiki naisha|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki-listed shrine|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. The enshrined deities are {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|qid=Q313119|lt=?sazaki-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Atsuta Shrine|Q482065|qid=Q482065|lt=Atsuta-no-?kami|1=Atsuta Shrine}}. It is said to have been founded in the era of Emperor Sujin. === Sources === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/sportskanko/bunka/1001473/1002598.html Kumaku Shrine | Official Nishio City website] *[https://nishiokanko.com/list/shop/kamakujinjya/ Kumaku Shrine - Nishio Tourism - Nishio Tourism Association] *[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/db/heritages/detail/144938 Kumaku Shrine Main Hall - Cultural Heritage Online Database] {{?? ?}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kumaku Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:Cultural heritage monuments in Japan]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nishio]] [[Category:西尾市の歴史]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nishio]]
